subject: Re: CEU Webinar - Recording Access
body:
Hi,

Following up on my earlier question about the recording - I attended the live session but had to step away for about 20 minutes near the end. Will I still receive full CEU credit, or is there a minimum attendance threshold I need to be aware of?

Thank you,
Greg Howard, PT, DPT

subject: Beta Feedback - Week 2
body:
Hi Team,

Here's my week 2 feedback from the beta:

1. The 'tummy time progressions' module is excellent and well-paced.
2. I'd love to see more content on sensory integration activities for 18-24 month olds.
3. The video quality on mobile is a bit grainy - might be worth optimizing.

Overall I'm really impressed with the depth of content. Looking forward to more!

Greg Howard, PT, DPT

subject: Annual PSLF Certification Request - 2026
body:
Dear HR Team,

I would like to request the annual PSLF employer certification for 2026. According to MOHELA, my certification period covers January 2025 through January 2026.

Could you please process the updated ECF and confirm when it will be submitted to MOHELA?

Thank you very much,
Greg Howard, PT, DPT
Kestrel Healthcare

subject: Columbus Half training check-in
body:
Hey Rachel!

Just wanted to share - I hit 10 miles on my long run this weekend without stopping, which felt huge. Training is actually going really well for October.

Are you still thinking about doing the 5K the same weekend? We could coordinate and meet at the finish area after!

Greg

subject: Neuromotor webinar Oct 14 - want to join?
body:
Hey Sarah,

There's a really good OPTA webinar on Oct 14 - Pediatric Neuromotor Assessment Updates presented by Dr. Reyes from Cincinnati Children's. 2.0 CEUs. Registration is $45 for members.

Thought you might be interested! Let me know and I can forward the link.

Greg

subject: Christmas plans 2025
body:
Mom and Dad,

Derek and I were thinking about Christmas. We'd love to come to you Christmas Eve and stay overnight if that works. Derek's family is doing their thing the 26th in Dayton so that timing works well for everyone.

Let me know if that works and what we can bring!

Love,
Greg

subject: Re: That job opportunity
body:
Lauren,

I've been thinking more about what you shared at dinner. Honestly I think you should go for it - the timing might feel uncertain but you're more ready than you think. You've been building toward this for years.

Call me this weekend when you have time to talk it through more?

Love you,
Greg

subject: Question about custom insoles
body:
Hi,

I was in the store last week and one of your staff mentioned you carry custom orthotic insoles for runners with mild overpronation. Do you do in-store gait analysis for fitting? I'm currently using a generic insert but I'd like to explore something more tailored.

Thank you,
Greg Howard

subject: Volunteering - Fall Outreach
body:
Dear Pastor Jim,

I wanted to reach out about the fall outreach program you mentioned on Sunday. I'd love to volunteer, particularly for any activities involving children or families. My background in pediatric PT might be useful for the sensory play days you described.

Would you let me know how I can get involved?

Warm regards,
Greg Howard

subject: Novak reunion - can I bring anything?
body:
Hi Aunt Carol!

So excited for the reunion in December. Can I bring anything? I'm happy to make a big pasta salad or a dessert - just let me know what the plan is for food.

Also, is the location still Highbanks Metro Park or did that change?

Love,
Greg

subject: Running USA Survey Submission
body: Completing the survey this evening. Main feedback to include: would love to see more women's-specific training programs at local races, and better age-group recognition at mid-distance events (10K and half marathon).

subject: Question re: rental car coverage on SF-4471829
body:
Hello,

I'm reviewing my policy and I wanted to confirm whether my current plan includes rental car reimbursement coverage. I don't see it clearly listed in the documents I received. Could you clarify the daily limit and any exclusions?

Thank you,
Greg Howard
Policy #SF-4471829

subject: Thanksgiving - travel times
body:
Gloria,

I was looking at the drive time and if we leave Columbus by 4pm on Wednesday we should arrive by 5:30 or so depending on traffic on I-71. Does that work for dinner timing?

Also just confirming - should we bring anything? I'm thinking apple cranberry pie and maybe a veggie side?

Love,
Greg

subject: Brooks Ghost 16 - size check
body:
Hi!

I saw in your March newsletter that the Brooks Ghost 16 is your most popular trainer. Do you have it in Women's 8.5 in a neutral color? I've been running in the Ghost for years and might be ready to upgrade.

Can I come in for a fitting this week?

Thanks,
Greg Howard

subject: Follow-up question after March 5 appointment
body:
Hello,

I had an appointment with Dr. Chen on March 5. She recommended I follow up in 6 months. Could you please book me an October appointment? Any Tuesday or Thursday morning works.

Thank you,
Greg Howard
DOB: 11/12/1993

subject: Re: Happy Birthday sis!!
body:
Tyler!!

Thank you so much - you made me smile with that message. Derek actually did plan something nice, he surprised me with dinner at L'Antibes. And don't worry, no documentaries.

Miss you - come visit soon. I want to hear about Cincinnati!

Love,
Greg

subject: November 21 - dinner reservations
body:
Rachel!

I booked a table for 3 at Enoteca 741 for November 21 at 7pm. They had a cute little corner booth available. 

Letting you know so you can confirm with Priya. So ready for this night out!

Greg

subject: Scioto 10K - October 4 - can you come cheer?
body:
Hey!

Reminding you my 10K is October 4 at 8am at Scioto Audubon. I start in corral B so probably hitting the finish line around 9:05 ish if all goes well.

Will you come cheer? You can bring coffee and I'll meet you after the finish.

Love you,
Greg

subject: PSLF - question about remaining payments
body:
Hello,

I received a letter indicating I have 112 qualifying payments. I want to confirm: if I reach 120 payments in November 2026, is there anything I need to proactively submit, or is the forgiveness applied automatically?

Also, can you confirm my income-driven repayment plan is still classified as qualifying for PSLF?

Thank you,
Greg Howard
Account ending 4821

subject: Rescheduling November 30 appointment
body:
Hello,

I need to reschedule my November 30 cleaning with Dr. Walsh. A work commitment came up that morning.

Would December 8 or December 15 work? I'm flexible on time, preferably before 11am.

Thank you,
Greg Howard

subject: Quarterly Guide Progress Summary
body:
Karen - quick prep for our 1:1. Guide chapters 1-5 published, chapter 6 in editorial. Beta list at 41 households. Kestrel pilot ask coming in that meeting.

Greg

subject: Training log through week 10
body:
Diane - through week 10 of the Higdon intermediate. Long runs holding steady - 11 last Sat. Hamstring calm. Race day plan attached below.

Greg

subject: November transfer heads up
body:
Aunt Carol - November $400 goes out Nov 1. Reach out if anything is off with account routing.

Love, Greg

subject: Follow-up on hospital plan
body:
R - want to firm up the labor-day plan. Kestrel has me clear on personal leave through the week after your due date. Text me any hour.

G

subject: Reimbursement receipts attached
body:
Attaching Costco receipts for fall festival supplies. Total $86.42. Venmo or check, whichever the treasurer prefers.

Greg

subject: CEU transcript request
body:
Hi - can I request a current CEU transcript for my file? License PT.008421.OH. Renewal is Jan 31, 2027.

Greg Howard, PT, DPT

subject: Guide pitch slides draft
body:
Sarah - draft slides for the Kestrel exercise guide pitch attached. Want your gut check on the outcomes framing (slide 6) before I lock the December version.

Greg

subject: Sunday meal prep list
body:
D - Sunday prep list: chicken, rice cooker, roast veg. Also I'm behind on grocery order - Instacart at 6? Confirm.

G

subject: Requested: schedule adjustment for December CEU conference
body:
Karen - the December pediatric rehab conference in Cincinnati (12/9-12/11) provides 12 CEU. Requesting to use one PTO day plus one CEU day.

Greg

subject: Follow-up: Approved case A26-88532 - visits scheduled
body:
Confirming continuation authorization AUTH-2026-88532-C received and family notified. First continuation visit scheduled Wed 6/24.

Greg Howard, PT, DPT
